name: @aardwin/auth-browser
description: aardwin 嵌入式 OAuth 登录组件 —— <aardwin-auth> Web Component

scripts.build: bun run build:dist && bun run build:types
scripts.build:dist: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.mjs --target browser --minify && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/react.d.ts','dist/react.d.ts')"
scripts.build:iife: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/aardwin-auth.iife.js --format iife --target browser --minify && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/aardwin-auth.iife.js','../../packages/frontend/public/aardwin-auth.iife.js')"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run build:iife && bun test
